pop.description: Pop music emphasizes catchy hooks, polished production, and broad appeal. Typically high energy and danceability with positive valence. Production is heavily processed and electronic.
pop.typical_use: parties, workouts, upbeat daily activities, social settings

lofi.description: Lo-fi hip hop uses deliberately warm, imperfect production — vinyl crackle, muffled drums, jazzy chords. Intentionally low energy and slow tempo promote focus without distraction.
lofi.typical_use: studying, late-night work, relaxed background listening

rock.description: Rock music features distorted guitars, strong rhythmic drive, and high energy. Emphasizes raw power and emotional directness. Low acousticness, high intensity.
rock.typical_use: workouts, driving, intense focus, emotional release

ambient.description: Ambient music prioritizes texture and atmosphere over melody or rhythm. Very low energy, high acousticness, slow or no discernible tempo — designed to blend into the environment.
ambient.typical_use: meditation, deep focus, sleep, background atmosphere

jazz.description: Jazz features improvisation, complex harmonies, and organic instrumentation. Generally acoustic with moderate tempo, warm energy, and high valence. Sophisticated and expressive.
jazz.typical_use: coffee shops, relaxed evenings, creative work, winding down

synthwave.description: Synthwave uses 80s-inspired analog synthesizers and electronic drum machines. Medium-high energy with a nostalgic, cinematic, slightly dark mood. Consistent driving tempo.
synthwave.typical_use: night drives, retro aesthetics, focused work, gaming

indie pop.description: Indie pop blends accessible melodies with independent production sensibilities. Moderate energy, often emotionally nuanced with strong hooks and a personal, unpolished charm.
indie pop.typical_use: casual listening, road trips, creative sessions

classical.description: Classical music features orchestral or acoustic instruments with formal compositional structure. Very low energy, very high acousticness, wide emotional dynamic range from serene to powerful.

hip-hop.description: Hip-hop centers on rhythmic vocal delivery over produced beats. High danceability and energy; often bold and confident in tone. Low acousticness, heavy bass presence.

r&b.description: R&B blends soulful vocals with groove-oriented production. Moderate energy with high valence and danceability. Emotionally expressive, warm, and intimate.
r&b.typical_use: relaxed evenings, romantic settings, chill playlists

country.description: Country music features acoustic instruments, storytelling lyrics, and nostalgic themes. Moderate energy with warm, organic production and high acousticness.
country.typical_use: road trips, outdoor activities, reflective moods

metal.description: Metal features high-gain guitars, aggressive rhythms, and extreme energy. Very low valence and acousticness. Designed for maximum intensity, power, and adrenaline.
metal.typical_use: intense workouts, emotional release, high-adrenaline activities

latin.description: Latin music emphasizes rhythm, percussion, and danceable grooves. High energy and danceability with uplifting, social energy. Strong percussive drive and vibrant arrangements.
latin.typical_use: dancing, parties, celebrations, upbeat social settings

folk.description: Folk music uses acoustic instrumentation and narrative, intimate songwriting. Low energy and very high acousticness. Emotionally honest and introspective.
folk.typical_use: quiet evenings, emotional processing, introspective moods

dream pop.description: Dream pop layers reverb-heavy, atmospheric production over melodic songwriting. Medium energy with a hazy, introspective quality. Blurs the line between waking and dreaming.
dream pop.typical_use: winding down, creative daydreaming, introspective listening

happy.description: Upbeat, bright, and celebratory. High valence songs that feel joyful and energizing. Associated with positive life moments and social connection.

chill.description: Relaxed and easygoing without being melancholic. Low pressure, comfortable energy that creates a safe, unhurried atmosphere.

intense.description: High energy, driven, and powerful. Built for peak performance and maximum engagement. Demands full attention.

focused.description: Calm but mentally alert. Minimal distraction, steady energy that sustains concentration over long periods without fatigue.

relaxed.description: Gentle and unhurried. Lower arousal with a comfortable, warm quality. Promotes physical and mental rest.
relaxed.best_for: rest, slow mornings, winding down after a long day

moody.description: Atmospheric and introspective with a darker or more complex emotional texture. Not sad — more contemplative and layered.
moody.best_for: late nights, creative work, emotional processing

melancholic.description: Bittersweet and reflective. Acknowledges sadness without being overwhelmingly dark. Nostalgic and tender.
melancholic.best_for: emotional reflection, rainy days, introspective moments

hype.description: Energetic, loud, and motivating. Designed to build excitement and momentum rapidly. Pushes you to move.

romantic.description: Warm, intimate, and emotionally expressive. Creates a personal, connected atmosphere between people.

nostalgic.description: Evokes vivid memories and a sense of the past. Bittersweet warmth tied to places, people, or times gone by.

angry.description: Raw, aggressive emotional energy. High intensity with low valence. Channels frustration and tension outward.

uplifting.description: Hopeful and inspiring. Builds emotional momentum toward positivity and possibility. Feels forward-looking.

sad.description: Low energy and low valence. Emotionally heavy and introspective. Validates difficult feelings without trying to fix them.
sad.best_for: processing grief, emotional catharsis, rainy days

dreamy.description: Hazy, atmospheric, and otherworldly. Blurs the line between focus and reverie. Soft edges, floating quality.
dreamy.best_for: creative daydreaming, winding down, introspective listening
